title: Simulated: Enhanced Diagrams
description: A Create: Simulated addon that allows you to freely look at your sublevel in a Contraption Diagram.
body:
**Simulated: Enhanced Diagrams** is a **Client-side** addon for Create Aeronautics that allows free-viewing of sublevels inside of a Contraption Diagram.
  
---

Features:
- Pan the diagram view by holding the Middle Mouse Button.
- Zoom in and out using the Scroll Wheel.
- Rotate the camera by holding Left Click.

**!!!** Sticky Notes are now created by Right Clicking.
